name: opportunity-validation
description: Validate opportunity data before it moves to specific stages

requiredStage.description: Stage that triggers validation (e.g., Proposal, Negotiation)

errorMessage.description: Error message to display if validation fails

elements.instruction: Add a decision called Check_Stage with rule At_Required_Stage if StageName equals {{requiredStage}} then Validate_Fields, otherwise End
Add a decision called Validate_Fields with rule Field_Is_Blank if {{requiredField}} is null then Show_Error, otherwise End
Add a screen called Show_Error displaying the message: {{errorMessage}}

params.errorMessage: Budget amount is required before moving to Proposal stage
Decision maker must be identified before negotiation
